PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?jerseyNumber WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P569 "1983-05-28" ^^ xsd:date ; wdt:P19 wd:Q1447 ; p:P463 [ ps:P463 wd:Q166896 ; pq:P575 ?transferDate ; pq:P2065 ?jerseyNumber ] .
  FILTER(YEAR(?transferDate) = 2011)
}
